name: openEuler GNOME SIG
description: The GNOME team is responsible for GNOME Desktop

name: openEuler GNOME SIG Repository List
description: openEuler GNOME SIG maintains 119 repositories in the Desktop and Graphics domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler GNOME SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The GNOME team is responsible for GNOME Desktop. The SIG has 8 core members and maintains 119 repositories in the Desktop and Graphics domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler GNOME SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler GNOME SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler GNOME SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler GNOME SIG maintains 119 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/GNOME.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler GNOME SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler GNOME SIG has 5 Maintainers, including: Ding Wenlong, Zhang Lin, Yan An. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
